name: Falcon-7B
archDisplay: Causal decoder-only Transformer, 7B (32 layers, multiquery attention, RoPE, FlashAttention)
note: Apache-2.0 causal decoder trained on 1.5T RefinedWeb tokens; the small, widely-adopted entry point of the original Falcon line.
verificationNotes: Confirmed real via HF model card (tiiuae/falcon-7b) and TII/ATRC press coverage: 7B params, Apache 2.0, 2048-token (2K) context, released May 25 2023 together with Falcon-40B/1.3B. open-llm-leaderboard-avg 48.8 confirmed verbatim on huggingface.co/blog/falcon. Corrected langCount 9→11: the card's language list (English, German, Spanish, French primary + Italian, Portuguese, Polish, Dutch, Romanian, Czech, Swedish limited) is identical to Falcon-40B's and totals 11, not 9.
